  <body class="recruit">
    <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) -->
    <noscript><iframe src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-MMT4FMDG"
    height="0" width="0" style="display:none;visibility:hidden"></iframe></noscript>
    <!-- End Google Tag Manager (noscript) -->
    <header class="header__recruit">
      <div>
        <a href="/"><img class="header__logo" src=https://nitto-shoji.com/wp-content/themes/original/assets/images/icon_corporate.png loading='lazy' alt></a>
        <div class="header__title">
          <p>すべての人に、ここちよい一日を。</p>
          <h2>日東商事グループ</h2>
        </div>
      </div>
      <nav class="is-pc">
        <a href="/requirements" class="header__nav__job">募集中の職種</a>
        <a href="/contact_recruit" class="header__nav__entry">採用についてお問い合わせ</a>
      </nav>
      <button class="button-hamburger is-sp" aria-label="グローバルメニューを開く" data-modal="global-menu"></button>
    </header>
    <aside class="is-sp loading" id="global-menu">
      <div>
        <div class="global-menu" role="navigation">
